Privacy Notice and Data Processing Addendum — Lang Hoa Technologies JSC (Vietnam issuer listed on Saigon Equity Exchange, SAX)
This notice applies to employee, banking, and securities disclosure workflows under Decree 13/2023/ND-CP and the Securities Law 2019.
Personal data means information associated with or helping identify a specific person; examples we process in these workflows include HR role IDs (e.g., EMP-00Z7), payroll account references (e.g., ACCT-000-XYZ), tax code placeholders (e.g., 12A-456-BC), and role mailboxes (e.g., payroll@langhoatech.vn).
We do not collect national ID images, passport numbers, or personal phone numbers for routine investor relations; public helplines and generic form labels may be used instead.
Data recipients may include Saigon Custody Bank Co., Indochina Securities Registry LLC, and the SAX CBTT disclosure portal; cross-border hosting by LotusCloud Pte Ltd (SG) is subject to a transfer impact assessment filed with the National Data Protection Office (NDPO).
Retention: employee payroll transaction logs are kept 24 months; IR inquiry summaries and SAX CBTT copies are kept 36 months; stale press releases remain accessible as public records.
MNPI control: internal draft term sheet for a private placement of ordinary shares, including a tentative price band and target date, is treated as non-public until lodged with the Viet Capital Market Authority (VCMA) and posted via the SAX CBTT; do not communicate any details externally before official disclosure.
References to our 2025 Annual Report and audited financial statements posted on SAX on 15 March 2026 are public information and not restricted.
Blackout calendar examples in training materials are illustrative and do not reflect live windows; employees must follow formal notices issued by Compliance.
Lawful bases: compliance with VCMA circulars on disclosure, performance of employment contracts, and legitimate interests in fraud prevention.
Data subject rights: you may request access, correction, deletion, or transfer restriction; submit a DSAR via privacy@langhoatech.vn; we acknowledge within 72 hours and respond within 15 working days per Decree 13.
Security measures include role-based access, pseudonymous employee identifiers, and audit trails in the Disclosure Management System; credential sharing is prohibited.
Public references such as news coverage of the SAX trading halt on 02 Oct 2024 and archived issuer notices are included for context and do not constitute selective disclosure.
Banking instruction updates for payroll routing at Saigon Custody Bank Co. are operational notices and do not relate to issuer securities or market-sensitive matters.
If a selective disclosure risk is identified, Compliance will trigger a corrective public announcement via SAX within the required timing; the IR team will avoid private briefings that could create unequal information.
